title: Plan omits the bulk-import row cap from the spec
body: Spec mandates a 5000-row cap on bulk import, but the plan's Bulk Import section does not specify where the cap is enforced (gateway vs handler) or what error is returned past the cap.

title: No migration plan for existing records that lack the new field
body: The new optional 'category' field is added to the schema but the plan doesn't say how existing rows are backfilled or whether reads tolerate null.
